channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-23T18:52Z — 818 outages, 17,238 customers, 561 fair-weather, 9 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NC-DEC: 1394 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NJ-PSEG: 1158 cust (NEAR OPERATING DC FAIR-WEATH) | NJ-PSEG: 1156 cust (NEAR OPERATING DC FAIR-WEATH) | NC-DEC: 628 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
